---
title: "scRNA_script"

---

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(cowplot)
theme_set(theme_cowplot())
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggrepel)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
```

```{r}
### helper: clean metadata to avoid VlnPlot crashes ###
clean_metadata <- function(obj, features) {
  for (f in features) {
    if (f %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)) {
      obj@meta.data[[f]] <- as.numeric(obj@meta.data[[f]])
      obj@meta.data[[f]][is.na(obj@meta.data[[f]])] <- 0
      obj@meta.data[[f]][!is.finite(obj@meta.data[[f]])] <- 0
    }
  }
  return(obj)
}
### function to process one sample ###
### function to process one sample ###
process_sample <- function(sample_dir) {
  
  tryCatch({
    
    sample_name <- basename(sample_dir)
    message("Processing: ", sample_name)
    
    # read data (handle multi-modal safely)
    counts <- Read10X(data.dir = sample_dir)
    if (is.list(counts)) {
      counts <- counts[["Gene Expression"]]
    }
    
    # create object
    obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = counts, project = sample_name)
    obj$sample <- sample_name
    
    # remove zero-count cells early (prevents Inf/NA later)
    obj <- subset(obj, subset = nCount_RNA > 0 & nFeature_RNA > 0)
    
    # detect mitochondrial gene pattern automatically
    mt_pattern <- "^mt-"
    if (sum(grepl(mt_pattern, rownames(obj))) == 0) {
      mt_pattern <- "^MT-"
    }
    
    obj$percent.mt <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = mt_pattern)
    obj$percent.mt[is.na(obj$percent.mt)] <- 0
    
    obj$filter_status <- "Unfiltered"
    
    # clean before plotting
    obj <- clean_metadata(obj, c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"))
    
    # unfiltered plot
    vln_unfiltered <- VlnPlot(
      obj,
      features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"),
      cols = "blue",
      ncol = 3
    )
    
    # filtering
    obj_filt <- subset(obj, subset = percent.mt < 60)
    obj_filt$filter_status <- "Filtered"
    
    # safe quantiles
    q_nFeature <- quantile(obj_filt$nFeature_RNA, probs = c(0.05, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
    q_nCount   <- quantile(obj_filt$nCount_RNA, probs = c(0.05, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    obj_filt <- subset(
      obj_filt,
      subset = nFeature_RNA > q_nFeature[1] &
               nFeature_RNA < q_nFeature[2] &
               nCount_RNA > q_nCount[1] &
               nCount_RNA < q_nCount[2]
    )
    
    # complexity ratio (safe)
    obj_filt$complexity_ratio <- obj_filt$nFeature_RNA / obj_filt$nCount_RNA
    
    # remove NA/Inf BEFORE filtering
    obj_filt <- subset(
      obj_filt,
      subset = !is.na(complexity_ratio) & is.finite(complexity_ratio)
    )
    
    obj_filt <- subset(obj_filt, subset = complexity_ratio < 0.5)
    
    # clean again before plotting
    obj_filt <- clean_metadata(obj_filt, c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"))
    
    # merge for comparison
    combined <- merge(obj, y = obj_filt)
    combined$filter_status <- factor(
      combined$filter_status,
      levels = c("Unfiltered", "Filtered")
    )
    
    combined <- clean_metadata(combined, c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"))
    
    vln_combined <- VlnPlot(
      combined,
      features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"),
      group.by = "filter_status",
      pt.size = 0,
      cols = c("blue", "red"),
      ncol = 3
    )
    
    # save plots
    if (!dir.exists("QC")) dir.create("QC")
    
    pdf(paste0("QC/Violin_", sample_name, ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 12.5)
    print(vln_combined)
    dev.off()
    
    png(paste0("QC/Violin_", sample_name, ".png"), width = 2000, height = 1500, res = 300)
    print(vln_combined)
    dev.off()
    
    return(list(
       before = obj,
       after = obj_filt
    ))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("❌ Error in sample: ", sample_dir)
    message("   ", e$message)
    return(NULL)
  })
}
setwd("/media/horneflablinux/Storage1/scRNA_Johannes")
### 🔁 find all sample directories automatically ###
sample_dirs <- list.dirs(path = ".", recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)

# optionally filter only those starting with "d"
sample_dirs <- sample_dirs[grepl("^./d", sample_dirs)]

### 🔁 run pipeline on all ###
seurat_list <- lapply(sample_dirs, process_sample)

names(seurat_list) <- basename(sample_dirs)
```


```{r}
### use samples from QC ###
samples <- names(seurat_list)

before_counts_list <- list()
after_counts_list <- list()
cells_lost_list <- list()

for (sample in samples) {
  
  before_obj <- seurat_list[[sample]]$before
  after_obj  <- seurat_list[[sample]]$after
  
  before_counts <- table(before_obj$sample)
  after_counts  <- table(after_obj$sample)
  
  cells_lost <- before_counts - after_counts
  
  before_counts_list[[sample]] <- as.numeric(before_counts)
  after_counts_list[[sample]]  <- as.numeric(after_counts)
  cells_lost_list[[sample]]    <- as.numeric(cells_lost)
}

cell_summary <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(before_counts_list),
  Before_Filtering = unlist(before_counts_list),
  After_Filtering = unlist(after_counts_list),
  Cells_Lost = unlist(cells_lost_list)
)

output_dir <- "QC"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)

write.xlsx(cell_summary,
           file = file.path(output_dir, "cell_filtering_summary.xlsx"),
           rowNames = FALSE)


## Combine the datasets ##
filtered_list <- lapply(seurat_list, function(x) x$after)

combined_filtered <- merge(
  x = filtered_list[[1]],
  y = filtered_list[-1],
  add.cell.ids = names(filtered_list),
  project = "CombinedallSamples"
)


## Normalize the data ##
combined_filtered <- NormalizeData(combined_filtered,
                                   normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
                                   scale.factor = 10000)

## Identify top highly variable features ##
combined_filtered <- FindVariableFeatures(
  combined_filtered,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000
)

# Plot top variable features ##
top30 <- head(VariableFeatures(combined_filtered), 30)
plot1 <- VariableFeaturePlot(combined_filtered)
plot_top30 <- LabelPoints(plot = plot1, points = top30, repel = TRUE)
print(plot_top30)

if (!dir.exists("top_variable_features")) dir.create("top_variable_features")

pdf("top_variable_features/top30.pdf", width = 5, height= 10)
print(plot_top30)
dev.off()

png("top_variable_features/top30.png", width = 2000, height = 4000, res=300)
print(plot_top30)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
combined_filtered <- ScaleData(
  combined_filtered,
  features = VariableFeatures(combined_filtered),
  verbose = FALSE
)

# 🔥 PCA (reduced overhead, same result quality)
combined_filtered <- RunPCA(
  combined_filtered,
  features = VariableFeatures(combined_filtered),
  npcs = 30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

# Optional lightweight inspection (safe + fast)
print(combined_filtered[["pca"]], dims = 1:20, nfeatures = 3)

# Skip expensive recomputation plots (COMMENTED FOR SPEED)
# VizDimLoadings(...)
# DimPlot(...)
# DimHeatmap(...)

# 🔥 Elbow plot (reduced dims = faster)
ep <- ElbowPlot(combined_filtered, ndims = 30)

if (!dir.exists("QC")) dir.create("QC")

pdf("QC/elbow_plot.pdf", width = 5, height = 10)
print(ep)
dev.off()

png("QC/elbow_plot.png", width = 2000, height = 4000, res = 300)
print(ep)
dev.off()

# 🔥 SPEED FIX 2: neighbors once (slightly larger dims for stability)
combined_filtered <- FindNeighbors(
  combined_filtered,
  dims = 1:20,
  verbose = FALSE
)

### ================================
### 🚀 UMAP (RUN ONCE ONLY — HUGE SPEEDUP)
### ================================

combined_filtered <- RunUMAP(
  combined_filtered,
  dims = 1:20,
  reduction = "pca",
  reduction.name = "umap.unintegrated",
  verbose = FALSE
)

### ================================
### 🚀 CLUSTERING ONLY LOOP (FAST)
### ================================

resolutions <- seq(0.1, 1, by = 0.1)

sample_levels <- unique(combined_filtered$sample)
sample_colors <- setNames(rainbow(length(sample_levels)), sample_levels)

custom_colors <- c(sample_colors,
                   "0"="lightblue1","1"="green2","2"="purple4","3"="orange1",
                   "4"="yellow2","5"="brown4","6"="pink1","7"="grey",
                   "8"="turquoise3","9"="darkgreen","10"="darkblue",
                   "11"="salmon1","12"="black","13"="limegreen",
                   "14"="violet","15"="cyan1","16"="lightyellow2",
                   "17"="lightgreen","18"="darkorange3","19"="maroon1",
                   "20"="magenta4")

if (!dir.exists("UMAP/unintegrated")) {
  dir.create("UMAP/unintegrated", recursive = TRUE)
}

for (res in resolutions) {
  
  # only clustering changes (fast operation)
  combined_filtered <- FindClusters(
    combined_filtered,
    resolution = res,
    cluster.name = "unintegrated_clusters",
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  clusters <- levels(Idents(combined_filtered))
  cluster_colors <- custom_colors[clusters]
  
  umap_sample_plot <- DimPlot(
    combined_filtered,
    reduction = "umap.unintegrated",
    group.by = "sample",
    cols = sample_colors
  ) + ggtitle(paste("UMAP by Sample - Resolution", res))
  
  umap_cluster_plot <- DimPlot(
    combined_filtered,
    reduction = "umap.unintegrated",
    group.by = "unintegrated_clusters",
    cols = cluster_colors
  ) + ggtitle(paste("UMAP by Cluster - Resolution", res))
  
  combined_plot <- umap_sample_plot + umap_cluster_plot +
    patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 2)
  
  pdf(paste0("UMAP/unintegrated/UMAP_unintegrated_res_", res, ".pdf"),
      width = 14, height = 6)
  print(combined_plot)
  dev.off()
}

```

```{r}
## -------------------------------
## Integration
## -------------------------------
combined_filtered$dataset_origin <- ifelse(
  grepl("m$", combined_filtered$sample),
  "Matsuki",
  "own"
)

combined_filtered$dataset_origin <- factor(
  combined_filtered$dataset_origin,
  levels = c("own", "Matsuki")
)

combined_filtered <- IntegrateLayers(
  combined_filtered,
  method = CCAIntegration,
  orig.reduction = "pca",
  new.reduction = "integrated.cca"
)

combined_filtered <- JoinLayers(combined_filtered)

combined_filtered <- FindNeighbors(
  combined_filtered,
  reduction = "integrated.cca",
  dims = 1:10,
  verbose = FALSE
)

## -------------------------------
## 🚀 RUN UMAP ONCE (CRITICAL FIX)
## -------------------------------
combined_filtered <- RunUMAP(
  combined_filtered,
  dims = 1:10,
  reduction = "integrated.cca",
  reduction.name = "umap.integrated",
  verbose = FALSE
)

## -------------------------------
## Setup output
## -------------------------------
if (!dir.exists("UMAP/integrated")) {
  dir.create("UMAP/integrated", recursive = TRUE)
}

resolutions <- seq(0.1, 1, by = 0.1)

sample_levels <- unique(combined_filtered$sample)
sample_colors <- setNames(rainbow(length(sample_levels)), sample_levels)

custom_colors <- c(sample_colors,
                   "0"="lightblue1","1"="green2","2"="purple4","3"="orange1",
                   "4"="yellow2","5"="brown4","6"="pink1","7"="grey",
                   "8"="turquoise3","9"="darkgreen","10"="darkblue",
                   "11"="salmon1","12"="black","13"="limegreen",
                   "14"="violet","15"="cyan1","16"="lightyellow2",
                   "17"="lightgreen","18"="darkorange3","19"="maroon1",
                   "20"="magenta4")

## -------------------------------
## 🚀 CLUSTER LOOP (FAST + CLEAN)
## -------------------------------
for (res in resolutions) {
  
  cluster_col <- paste0("integrated_clusters_", res)
  
  combined_filtered <- FindClusters(
    combined_filtered,
    resolution = res,
    cluster.name = cluster_col,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  Idents(combined_filtered) <- cluster_col
  
  clusters <- levels(Idents(combined_filtered))
  cluster_colors <- custom_colors[clusters]
  
  ## UMAP plots (same embedding, different labels)
  umap_sample_plot <- DimPlot(
    combined_filtered,
    reduction = "umap.integrated",
    group.by = "sample",
    cols = sample_colors
  ) + ggtitle(paste("UMAP by Sample - Resolution", res))
  
  umap_cluster_plot <- DimPlot(
    combined_filtered,
    reduction = "umap.integrated",
    group.by = cluster_col,
    cols = cluster_colors
  ) + ggtitle(paste("UMAP by Cluster - Resolution", res))
  
  combined_plot <- umap_sample_plot + umap_cluster_plot +
    patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 2)
  
  pdf(paste0("UMAP/integrated/UMAP_integrated_res_", res, ".pdf"),
      width = 14, height = 6)
  print(combined_plot)
  dev.off()
  
  ## save object WITH that resolution labeling
  saveRDS(
    combined_filtered,
    file = paste0("UMAP/integrated/combined_integrated_res_", res, ".rds")
  )
}

## -------------------------------
## Cluster tables
## -------------------------------
wb <- createWorkbook()

for (res in resolutions) {
  
  cluster_col <- paste0("integrated_clusters_", res)
  
  obj <- readRDS(
    paste0("UMAP/integrated/combined_integrated_res_", res, ".rds")
  )
  
  Idents(obj) <- cluster_col
  
  df <- as.data.frame(table(Idents(obj), obj$sample))
  colnames(df) <- c("Cluster", "Sample", "Cell_Count")
  
  wide_df <- df %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Sample, values_from = Cell_Count, values_fill = 0)
  
  addWorksheet(wb, paste0("Resolution_", res))
  writeData(wb, paste0("Resolution_", res), wide_df)
}

saveWorkbook(
  wb,
  "UMAP/integrated/cluster_sample_counts_by_resolution.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
## ---------- SAFE DIRECTORY SETUP ----------
if (!dir.exists("QC")) dir.create("QC")
if (!dir.exists("Markers/UMAPs")) dir.create("Markers/UMAPs", recursive = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists("Markers/dotplots")) dir.create("Markers/dotplots", recursive = TRUE)


## ---------- SAFE FEATURE HELPER ----------
safe_features <- function(obj, features) {
  features[features %in% colnames(obj[[]])]
}


## ---------- QC FEATURE PLOT ----------
qc_features <- safe_features(
  combined_filtered,
  c("percent.mt", "nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA")
)

if (length(qc_features) > 0) {

  plot_qc <- FeaturePlot(
    combined_filtered,
    features = qc_features,
    reduction = "umap.integrated",
    cols = c("lightgrey", "red"),
    ncol = length(qc_features)
  )

  pdf("QC/UMAP_filtered_after_integration.pdf", width = 10.5, height = 9)
  print(plot_qc)
  dev.off()

  png("QC/UMAP_filtered_after_integration.png", width = 2000, height = 1800, res = 300)
  print(plot_qc)
  dev.off()

} else {
  message("⚠️ QC features not found: skipping QC FeaturePlot")
}


## ---------- GENE FEATURE PLOTS ----------
for (gene in c("Nt5e", "Lypd8")) {
  
  if (gene %in% rownames(combined_filtered)) {
    
    plot <- FeaturePlot(
      combined_filtered,
      features = gene,
      reduction = "umap.integrated",
      split.by = "sample",
      max.cutoff = "q90",
      cols = c("lightgrey", "red"),
      ncol = 3
    )
    
    pdf(paste0("Markers/UMAPs/UMAP_filtered_after_integration_", gene, ".pdf"),
        width = 30, height = 8)
    print(plot)
    dev.off()
    
    png(paste0("Markers/UMAPs/UMAP_filtered_after_integration_", gene, ".png"),
        width = 3600, height = 1000, res = 300)
    print(plot)
    dev.off()
  }
}


## ---------- DOT PLOTS ----------
markers.to.plot <- c(
  "Lct","Maf","Aoc1","Neu1","Alpi","Anpep","Apoa4","Chga","Chgb",
  "Neurod1","Cpe","Muc2","Defa24","Agr2","Ccl6","Mki67","Krt8",
  "Msi1","Olfm4","Lgr5","Ascl2","Tert","Hopx","Gkn3","Dclk1",
  "Pou2f3","Trpm5","Avil"
)

for (res in resolutions) {
  
  obj <- readRDS(file.path(
    "UMAP/integrated",
    paste0("combined_UMAPS_integrated_res_", res, ".rds")
  ))
  
  genes.use <- intersect(markers.to.plot, rownames(obj))
  
  if (length(genes.use) == 0) {
    message("⚠️ No marker genes found for resolution ", res)
    next
  }
  
  sample_levels <- unique(obj$sample)
  
  if (length(sample_levels) < 2) {
    
    dotplot <- DotPlot(
      obj,
      features = genes.use,
      dot.scale = 6
    ) + RotatedAxis()
    
  } else {
    
    sample_colors <- setNames(
      rainbow(length(sample_levels)),
      sample_levels
    )
    
    dotplot <- DotPlot(
      obj,
      features = genes.use,
      split.by = "sample",
      cols = sample_colors,
      dot.scale = 6
    ) +
      RotatedAxis() +
      theme(legend.position = "right")
  }
  
  pdf(paste0("Markers/dotplots/Dotplot_marker_genes_res_", res, ".pdf"),
      width = 13, height = 20)
  print(dotplot)
  dev.off()
  
  png(paste0("Markers/dotplots/Dotplot_marker_genes_res_", res, ".png"),
      width = 2000, height = 3600, res = 300)
  print(dotplot)
  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(zellkonverter)

sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(combined_filtered)
reducedDim(sce, "X_umap") <- Embeddings(combined_filtered, "umap.integrated")
writeH5AD(sce, "combined_integrated.h5ad")
```
